sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45662" key="e)feckaide/katos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφεξκαιδέκατος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45662.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐφεκκαιδέκατος, λόγος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1021e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
